entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁVueеә”з”Ёд»Ӣз»Қ01рҹҳҺ
entry.content:
* йЎ№зӣ®ж №ж–Үд»¶еӨ№жңҖеҘҪдёҚиҰҒжңүдёӯж–Ү
* еҸҜдҪҝз”ЁHBuilder XжҲ–VS CodeејҖеҸ‘
* еҪ“еүҚVueеә”з”ЁйҖӮеә”з§»еҠЁз«ҜпјҢз”өи„‘и°ғиҜ•еҸҜжҢүF12иҝӣе…ҘејҖеҸ‘иҖ…и°ғиҜ•еҲҮжҚўи®ҫеӨҮ

йЎ№зӣ®з»“жһ„

еӯҗйЎ№еҗ«д№ү

  1. dist жү“еҢ…иҫ“еҮәж–Үд»¶еӨ№
  2. node_modules е®үиЈ…зҡ„еҢ…ж–Үд»¶еӨ№
    yarn add vant@3.0.0жҲ–иҖ…npm install vant@3.0.0 жү§иЎҢе®үиЈ…vant
  1. public е…¬е…ұж–Үд»¶еӨ№
  2. src д»Јз Ғж–Үд»¶еӨ№
    + api жҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү
    + components е…¬з”ЁжҺ§д»¶
    + enums жһҡдёҫ
    + routes и·Ҝз”ұе®ҡд№ү
    + steup еҲқе§ӢеҢ–пјҲжҡӮж—¶ж— з”Ёпјү
    + utils е·Ҙе…·зұ» пјҲеҸҜеңЁutils/http/axios/index.tsдёӯдҝ®ж”№WebAPIең°еқҖпјү
    + views и·Ҝз”ұжҢҮеҗ‘жҺ§д»¶
    - App.vue йЎ№зӣ®е…ҘеҸЈпјҲеҪ“еүҚе®ҡд№үдёәrouter-viewпјү
    - main.js е…ЁеұҖе®ҡд№үпјҲдҫӢеҰӮеј•е…Ҙvantзҡ„жҺ§д»¶пјү
  3. е…¶е®ғй…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶
    - vite.config.js пјҲеҸҜеңЁе…¶дёӯдҝ®ж”№ејҖеҸ‘ж—¶зҡ„з«ҜеҸЈзӯүпјү

еҰӮдҪ•ејҖеҸ‘

еҰӮдҪ•ж·»еҠ и·Ҝз”ұе’Ңи·іиҪ¬йЎөйқў

  1. еңЁsrc/routes/routers.jsдёӯж·»еҠ и·Ҝз”ұ
         const routes = [
         {
             name: 'notFound',
             path: '/:path(.*)+',
             redirect: {
                 name: 'main',
             },
         },
         {
             name: 'main',
             path: '/main',
             component: () => import('/@/components/Main.vue'),
             meta: {
                 title: 'дё»йЎө',
             },
         },
         {
             name: 'planning',
             path: '/planning',
             component: () => import('/@/views/Planning/index.vue'),
             meta: {
                 title: 'и®ЎеҲ’',
             },
         },
         {
             name: 'xxx',
             path: '/xxx',
             component: () => import('/@/views/Planning/index.vue'),
             meta: {
                 title: 'xxx',
             },
         },
     ];
  2. еңЁsrc/components/Main.vueж–°еўһжҢүй’®пјҲеҪ“еүҚдҪҝз”ЁдәҶжҺ§д»¶van-grid-itemеҶ…зҪ®зҡ„toж–№жі•пјү
    <van-grid-item icon="home-o" text="ж–°еўһ" to="ж–°еўһи·Ҝз”ұpath" />

еҰӮдҪ•е®ҡд№үжҺҘеҸЈеҸҠи°ғз”ЁжҺҘеҸЈ

  1. еңЁapi/demoж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӯж·»еҠ дёҖдёӘtsж–Үд»¶иҝӣиЎҢжҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№ү
    import { defHttp, otherHttp } from '/@/utils/http/axios';
    import { DemoParams, DemoListGetResultModel } from './model/tableModel';

    enum Api {
        DEMO_LIST = '/table/getDemoList',
    }

    /**
    * @description: Get sample list value
    */
    export function demoListApi(params: DemoParams) {
        return defHttp.request<DemoListGetResultModel>({
            url: Api.DEMO_LIST,
            method: 'GET',
            params,
            headers: {
            ignoreCancelToken: true,
            },
        });
    }
  1. е…Ҳеј•е…ҘжҺҘеҸЈе®ҡд№үпјҢз„¶еҗҺеңЁйЎөйқўи°ғз”Ё
    import { demoListApi } from '/@/api/demo/table';
    import { DemoListItem } from '/@/api/demo/table/model/tableModel';
    ...
    const methods = {};
      methods.search = async function(name) {
        dataContext.Loading = true;
        dataContext.selectedRowKeys = [];
		dataContext.Items = [];
        let response = [];

        try {
          if (name && name != '') {
            // и°ғз”ЁжҺҘеҸЈ
            response = await demoListApi({
				page: 2,
				pageSize: 5,
			});
			// иҺ·еҸ–жҺҘеҸЈиҝ”еӣһеҖјпјҢе№¶еӨ„зҗҶ
			const {
			  items
			} = response;
			
			dataContext.Items = items;
			
          }
		  
        } catch (e) {

          //ејӮеёёеӨ„зҗҶ
        } finally {

          setTimeout(() => {
            dataContext.Loading = false;
          }, 500);
        }
      };

еёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө

  1. жң¬ең°иҝҗиЎҢ
    yarn dev


2. жү“еҢ…еҸ‘еёғпјҢе°Ҷз”ҹжҲҗзҡ„distж–Үд»¶еӨ№еңЁIISдёӯеҸ‘еёғеҚіеҸҜ

    yarn build

entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁе°ҸжҠҖе·§еӨҮеҝҳеҪ•пјҲ04пјүжҗһиө·рҹҳҺ
entry.content:
еҰӮдҪ•еңЁReporting Servicesдёӯи°ғз”ЁWebServiceпјҹ

  1. еҲӣе»әWebServiceйЎ№зӣ®пјҢе№¶йҮҚж–°е®ҡд№үNamespaceпјӣ
  2. еҸ‘еёғWebServiceйЎ№зӣ®пјҢе№¶дё”ж”ҜжҢҒSOAP 1.1пјӣ
  3. дҪҝз”ЁReport Builder 3.0еҲӣе»әжҠҘиЎЁпјӣ
  4. еңЁжҠҘиЎЁдёӯж·»еҠ DataSourceпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ
  5. еңЁжҠҘиЎЁдёӯж·»еҠ DataSetпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ
        <Query xmlns="http://pom.org/">
	        <SoapAction>http://pom.org/GetMaterials</SoapAction>
        </Query>

        <Query>
            <Method Name="GetMaterials" Namespace="http://pom.org">
            <Parameters>
                <Parameter Name="еҸӮж•°1">
                    <DefaultValue>/</DefaultValue>
                </Parameter>
            </Parameters>
            </Method>
            <ElementPath IgnoreNamespaces="true">*</ElementPath>
        </Query>

entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁBCT Report Serverжҗһиө·рҹҳҺ з»ӯ02
entry.content:
еҰӮдҪ•и°ғз”ЁWebжңҚеҠЎиҺ·еҸ–ж•°жҚ®пјҹ

еҮҶеӨҮжңҚеҠЎ

  1. йҰ–е…Ҳз”ЁNodeJSпјҲе…¶е®ғиҜӯиЁҖдәҰеҸҜпјүзј–еҶҷдёҖдёӘWebAPIжөӢиҜ•жңҚеҠЎпјҲзӣ®еүҚжөӢиҜ•зңӢдёҠеҺ»дёҚйҖӮз”Ёjwtи®ӨиҜҒжҲ–OAuthжҺҲжқғпјҢжҺЁиҚҗдёҚйңҖиҰҒйӘҢиҜҒзҡ„ж–№ејҸпјү
    • app.js
    
    const express = require('express') //еј•е…Ҙз¬¬дёүж–№expressжЎҶжһ¶
    const app = express() //еҲӣе»әwebжңҚеҠЎ
    const path = require('path') //и·Ҝеҫ„з®ЎзҗҶжЁЎеқ—
    var utilities = require('./utils/utilities.js');
    module.exports = app;
    //и®ҫзҪ®и·Ёеҹҹи®ҝй—®
    app.all('*', function(req, res, next) {
        res.header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*");
        res.header("Access-Control-Allow-Headers",
            "Content-Type, Content-Length, Authorization, Accept, X-Requested-With, ignoreCancelToken");
        res.header("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "PUT,POST,GET,DELETE,OPTIONS");
        if (req.method == "OPTIONS") {
            res.send(200);
        } else {
            next();
        }
    });
    app.use(express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'public'))) //йқҷжҖҒиө„жәҗз®ЎзҗҶ
    const bodyParser = require('body-parser') //еӨ„зҗҶpostжҺҘж”¶еҖјзҡ„з¬¬дёүжЁЎеқ—
    app.use(bodyParser.urlencoded({
        extended: false
    })) //жҺҘж”¶postдј еҖјдёӯй—ҙд»¶
    app.use(bodyParser.json()) //жҺҘж”¶jsonдј зңҹдёӯй—ҙд»¶
    //й…ҚзҪ®дҪҝз”Ёcookieзҡ„
    const cookie = require('cookie-parser')
    app.use(cookie())
    //еј•е…ҘдәҢзә§и·Ҝз”ұ
    const table = require('./routes/table');
    //еҲӣе»әдёҖзә§и·Ҝз”ұ
    app.use('/table', table);
    var server = app.listen(12347, function() {
        var host = server.address().address
        var port = server.address().port
        console.log("еә”з”Ёе®һдҫӢпјҢи®ҝй—®ең°еқҖдёә http://%s:%s", "localhost", port)
    });
    • table.js
       
    var express = require('express');
    var table = express.Router();
    var db = require('../utils/db');
    var utilities = require('../utils/utilities.js');
    table.get('/getDemoList', function(req, res) {
        const page = req.query["page"];
        const pageSize = req.query["pageSize"];
        const field = req.query["field"];
        const order = req.query["order"];
        var sb = " DECLARE @DataScope nvarchar(64); ";
        sb += " SET @DataScope = N'жё©еәҰ'; ";
        sb += " EXECUTE [dbo].[CalculateTrendline] @DataScope; ";
        db.sql(sb, function(err, result) {
            if (err) {
                res.json(utilities.resultError({
                    message: err
                }));
                return;
            }
            var arr = result.recordsets[0];
            if (arr.length > 0 && order != null) {
                if (order == "ascend") {
                    arr = arr.sort(function(a, b) {
                        return a[field] > b[field] ? 1 : -1;
                    });
                } else if (order == "descend") {
                    arr = arr.sort(function(a, b) {
                        return a[field] < b[field] ? 1 : -1;
                    });
                }
            }
            if (page != null) {
                res.json(utilities.resultPageSuccess(page, pageSize, arr));            
            } else {
                res.json(utilities.resultSuccess({
                    items: arr,
                    total: arr.length
                }));
            }
        });
    });

еҰӮдҪ•и®ҫи®Ў

  1. еңЁи®ҫи®ЎжҠҘиЎЁж—¶пјҢж·»еҠ Web Service Data SourceпјҢж №жҚ®жҺҘеҸЈжғ…еҶөиҝӣиЎҢй…ҚзҪ®пјҢз„¶еҗҺжӢүеҸ–TableиҝӣиЎҢеұ•зӨә

еҰӮдҪ•дҪҝз”Ё

  1. дёәBCTWebReportServerе·ҘзЁӢж–°еўһеј•з”ЁTelerik.Reporting.WebServiceDataSourceпјҢз„¶еҗҺиҝӣиЎҢеҸ‘еёғ
  2. е°Ҷи®ҫи®Ўзҡ„жҠҘиЎЁжӢ–е…ҘReportsж–Үд»¶еӨ№еҚіеҸҜ

вң§вҒәвёң(в—ҸЛҷв–ҫЛҷв—Ҹ)вёқвҒәвң§

entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁе°ҸжҠҖе·§еӨҮеҝҳеҪ•пјҲ03пјүжҗһиө·рҹҳҺ
entry.content:
еҰӮдҪ•дҪҝз”Ё.NET SDKи°ғз”ЁBarTenderпјҹ

  1. е®үиЈ…BarTenderиҪҜд»¶пјҲзүҲжң¬2016 R8пјү
  2. жү“ејҖBarTender SDKж–Үд»¶еӨ№пјҢжүҫеҲ°жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„Seagull.BarTender.Printзұ»еә“
  3. ж–°е»әжҲ–жү“ејҖ.NET 4.0д»ҘдёҠзҡ„C#зЁӢеәҸпјҢж·»еҠ еј•з”ЁSeagull.BarTender.Printзұ»еә“
  4. дҪҝз”ЁBarTender Designerз”»еҘҪLabelпјҢзј–еҶҷд»Јз Ғи°ғз”ЁпјҢдҫӢеҰӮпјҡ
    // е®һдҫӢеҢ–дёҖдёӘBarTender engine
    using (var engine = new Engine(true))
    {
        // дҪҝз”ЁBarTender engineжү“ејҖ.btwж–Үд»¶з”ҹжҲҗдёҖдёӘLabelFormatDocumentеҜ№иұЎ
        var format = engine.Documents.Open(labelPath);
        // жҢҮе®ҡжү“еҚ°жңә
        format.PrintSetup.PrinterName = printerName;
        // жү“еҚ°д»Ҫж•°
        format.PrintSetup.IdenticalCopiesOfLabel = 1; 
        ...
        // дёәж•°жҚ®жәҗдј еҖј
        foreach (var keyValue in keyValues)
        {
            format.SubStrings.SetSubString(keyValue.Key, keyValue.Value);
        }
        Messages messages;
        // дҪҝз”ЁLabelFormatDocumentеҜ№иұЎиҝӣиЎҢжү“еҚ°пјҢе№¶иҝ”еӣһз»“жһң
        Result result = format.Print(printJobName, waitForCompletionTimeout, out messages);
        // е…ій—ӯLabelFormatDocumentеҜ№иұЎ
        format.Close(SaveOptions.DoNotSaveChanges);
        // жү“еҚ°з»“жһңеӨ„зҗҶ
        ...

    }

вң§вҒәвёң(в—ҸЛҷв–ҫЛҷв—Ҹ)вёқвҒәвң§

entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁе°ҸжҠҖе·§еӨҮеҝҳеҪ•пјҲ02пјүжҗһиө·рҹҳҺ
entry.content:
How to discern DM barcode with C#?

  1. дҪҝз”Ё ZXingзұ»еә“е’ҢDataMatrix.netзұ»еә“пјҢеҜ№еҺҹеӣҫиҝӣиЎҢDMз ҒиҜҶеҲ«
    // ZXing
    BarcodeReader reader = new BarcodeReader();
    Result result = reader.Decode(pImg);

    // DataMatrix.net
    DmtxImageDecoder dmDecoder = new DmtxImageDecoder();
    List<string> resultList = dmDecoder.DecodeImage(pImg);
  1. дҪҝз”ЁOpenCvSharpзұ»еә“пјҢеҜ№еӣҫеғҸиҝӣиЎҢеӨ„зҗҶ
    • еҜ№еӣҫеғҸиҝӣиЎҢзҒ°еәҰеӨ„зҗҶ
    • е»әз«ӢеӣҫеғҸзҡ„жўҜеәҰе№…еҖј
    • еҜ№еӣҫеғҸиҝӣиЎҢзӣёеә”зҡ„жЁЎзіҠеҢ–пјҢж¶ҲйҷӨдёҖдәӣеҷӘзӮ№
    • еҜ№еӣҫеғҸиҝӣиЎҢеҪўжҖҒеӯҰиҝҗз®—пјҢж¶ҲйҷӨзјқйҡҷ
    • еҜ№еӣҫеғҸиҝӣиЎҢи…җиҡҖпјҢз„¶еҗҺиҝӣиЎҢиҶЁиғҖпјҢж¶ҲйҷӨе№Іжү°
    • еҜ№зӣ®ж ҮиҪ®е»“иҝӣиЎҢжҹҘжүҫпјҢе№¶и®Ўз®—еӣҫеғҸйқўз§Ҝ
    • жүҫеҮәеҮ дёӘйқўз§ҜжңҖеӨ§зҡ„зҹ©еҪўпјҢе№¶иҫ“еҮәиҪ¬жҚўеӣҫ
  2. еҜ№иҪ¬жҚўеӣҫиҝӣиЎҢ1зӣёеҗҢж“ҚдҪң
  3. е°ҶиҜҶеҲ«з»“жһңеҺ»йҮҚдҝқеӯҳ

з»ҳеҲ¶жөҒзЁӢеӣҫ FlowchartпјҲжҡӮдёҚж”ҜжҢҒпјү

st=>start: ејҖе§Ӣ
op1=>operation:  еҺҹеӣҫиҜҶеҲ«
op2=>operation:  иҪ¬жҚўеӣҫиҜҶеҲ«
op3=>operation:  иҪ¬жҚў
cond=>condition: иҪ¬жҚўжҲҗеҠҹ Yes or No?
e=>end: иҫ“еҮәз»“жһң

st(right)->op1(right)->op3->cond(right)
cond(yes)->op2->e
cond(no)->e

вң§вҒәвёң(в—ҸЛҷв–ҫЛҷв—Ҹ)вёқвҒәвң§

entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁе°ҸжҠҖе·§еӨҮеҝҳеҪ•пјҲ01пјүжҗһиө·рҹҳҺ
entry.content:
Add Code128 to Report Builder 3.0

  1. First you need to install Code 128 font if you did not already! You can download it from here , and then it's better to restart the server

  2. Open your report or create a new one

  3. We need to add System.Drawing DLL file as reference:
    This can be done by going to the Report Properties (Right Click outside the body -> Report Properties),
    click on References tab, click on Add button in Add or remove assemblies section, click on the Open
    button ... Browse for C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\v2.0.50727\System.Drawing.dll file, and
    click Open.
    You should have something like this:

  4. Now we need to add some custom code to the report:
    Go to Code tab in the Report Properties, copy and past the following code and click Ok:

    Function StringToBarcode(value As String) As String
    Dim charPos, minCharPos As Integer
    Dim currentChar, checksum As Integer
    Dim isTableB As Boolean = True, isValid As Boolean = True
    Dim returnValue As String = String.Empty

    If (value Is Nothing OrElse value.Length = 0) Then
        Return String.Empty
    End If

    'Check for valid characters
    For charCount As Integer = 0 To value.Length - 1
        currentChar = Asc(value.Substring(charCount, 1))
        If (Not (currentChar >= 32 AndAlso currentChar <= 126)) Then
        isValid = False
        Exit For
        End If
    Next

    If Not (isValid) Then Return returnValue
    charPos = 0
    While (charPos < value.Length)
        If (isTableB) Then
        'See if interesting to switch to table C
        'yes for 4 digits at start or end, else if 6 digits
        If (charPos = 0 OrElse charPos + 4 = value.Length) Then
            minCharPos = 4
        Else
            minCharPos = 6
        End If
        minCharPos = IsNumber(value, charPos, minCharPos)

        If (minCharPos < 0) Then
            'Choice table C
            If (charPos = 0) Then
            'Starting with table C
            'char.ConvertFromUtf32(205)
            returnValue = Chr(205).ToString()
            Else
            'Switch to table C
            returnValue = returnValue + Chr(199).ToString()
            End If
            isTableB = False
        Else
            If (charPos = 0) Then
            'Starting with table B
            returnValue = Chr(204).ToString()
            'char.ConvertFromUtf32(204);
            End If
        End If
        End If

        If (Not isTableB) Then
        'We are on table C, try to process 2 digits
        minCharPos = 2
        minCharPos = IsNumber(value, charPos, minCharPos)

        If (minCharPos < 0) Then
            'OK for 2 digits, process it
            currentChar = Integer.Parse(value.Substring(charPos, 2))
            If (currentChar < 95) Then
            currentChar = currentChar + 32
            Else
            currentChar = currentChar + 100
            End If
            returnValue = returnValue + Chr(currentChar).ToString()
            charPos += 2
        Else
            'We haven't 2 digits, switch to table B
            returnValue = returnValue + Chr(200).ToString()
            isTableB = True
        End If
        End If

        If (isTableB) Then
        'Process 1 digit with table B
        returnValue = returnValue + value.Substring(charPos, 1)
        charPos += 1
        End If

    End While

    'Calculation of the checksum
    checksum = 0
    Dim loo As Integer
    For loo = 0 To returnValue.Length - 1
        currentChar = Asc(returnValue.Substring(loo, 1))
        If (currentChar < 127) Then
        currentChar = currentChar - 32
        Else
        currentChar = currentChar - 100
        End If
        If (loo = 0) Then
        checksum = currentChar
        Else
        checksum = (checksum + (loo * currentChar)) Mod 103
        End If
    Next

    'Calculation of the checksum ASCII code
    If (checksum < 95) Then
        checksum = checksum + 32
    Else
        checksum = checksum + 100
    End If

    ' Add the checksum and the STOP
    returnValue = returnValue + _
    Chr(checksum).ToString() + _
    Chr(206).ToString()

    Return returnValue
    End Function

    Function IsNumber(InputValue As String, CharPos As Integer, MinCharPos As Integer) As Integer
    MinCharPos -= 1
    If (CharPos + MinCharPos < InputValue.Length) Then
        While (MinCharPos >= 0)
        If (Asc(InputValue.Substring(CharPos + MinCharPos, 1)) < 48 _
        OrElse Asc(InputValue.Substring(CharPos + MinCharPos, 1)) > 57) Then
        Exit While
        End If
        MinCharPos -= 1
        End While
    End If
    Return MinCharPos  
    End Function

    Public Function Code128(ByVal stringText As String) As Byte()
    Dim result As Byte() = Nothing

    Try
    result = GenerateImage("Code 128", StringToBarcode(stringText))
    Catch ex As Exception
    End Try

    Return result
    End Function

    Public Function GenerateImage(ByVal fontName As String, ByVal stringText As String) As Byte()
    Dim oGraphics As System.Drawing.Graphics
    Dim barcodeSize As System.Drawing.SizeF
    Dim ms As System.IO.MemoryStream

    Using font As New System.Drawing.Font(New System.Drawing.FontFamily(fontName), 30)
    Using tmpBitmap As New System.Drawing.Bitmap(1, 1, System.Drawing.Imaging.PixelFormat.Format32bppArgb)
    oGraphics = System.Drawing.Graphics.FromImage(tmpBitmap)
    oGraphics.TextRenderingHint = System.Drawing.Text.TextRenderingHint.SingleBitPerPixel
    barcodeSize = oGraphics.MeasureString(stringText, font)
    oGraphics.Dispose()
    End Using

    Using newBitmap As New System.Drawing.Bitmap(barcodeSize.Width, barcodeSize.Height, System.Drawing.Imaging.PixelFormat.Format32bppArgb)
    oGraphics = System.Drawing.Graphics.FromImage(newBitmap)
    oGraphics.TextRenderingHint = System.Drawing.Text.TextRenderingHint.SingleBitPerPixel

    Using oSolidBrushWhite As New System.Drawing.SolidBrush(System.Drawing.Color.White)
    Using oSolidBrushBlack As New System.Drawing.SolidBrush(System.Drawing.Color.Black)
    oGraphics.FillRectangle(oSolidBrushWhite, New System.Drawing.Rectangle(0, 0, barcodeSize.Width, barcodeSize.Height))
    oGraphics.DrawString(stringText, font, oSolidBrushBlack, 0, 0)
    End Using

    End Using

    ms = New System.IO.MemoryStream()
    newBitmap.Save(ms, System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat.Png)
    End Using
    End Using

    Return ms.ToArray()
    End Function

  1. Insert an image in your report, and select Database as the image source, and use image/png as MIMI type:

  2. Click on fx button in Use this field button, and use this function
    =Code.Code128(Fields!your_field_name.Value), press Ok and Ok.

  3. Run the report, now you have a barcode~

еҸӮиҖғ

stackoverflow.com

вң§вҒәвёң(в—ҸЛҷв–ҫЛҷв—Ҹ)вёқвҒәвң§

entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁBCT Report Serverжҗһиө·рҹҳҺ
entry.content:
еҝ«йҖҹдёҠжүӢ

зҺҜеўғй…ҚзҪ®

е®үиЈ…

  1. е®үиЈ…Telerik Report DesignerпјҲTelerik_Reporting_R2_2019_13_1_19_514_DEV.msiпјү

иҝҗиЎҢеҸ‘еёғ

  1. дёӢиҪҪBCTWebReportServer_KendoUI.7zпјҢи§ЈеҺӢе№¶з”ЁVSжү“ејҖе·ҘзЁӢ
  2. жү“ејҖControllers\ReportsController.csпјҢдҝ®ж”№HostAppIdпјҢйҒҝе…ҚеҶІзӘҒ
  3. еҸ‘еёғеҲ°ж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹпјҢдҪҝз”ЁIISжҗӯе»әзҪ‘з«ҷ
    Congratulations, the BCT Report Server has been built successfully ~

з»ҳеҲ¶жҠҘиЎЁ

еҸҜеҸӮиҖғDESIGNING REPORTS

еҸ‘еёғжҠҘиЎЁ

  1. е°ҶжҠҘиЎЁж–Үд»¶жӢ–е…Ҙж–Үд»¶зі»з»ҹзҡ„"Reports"ж–Үд»¶еӨ№дёӯ
  2. еңЁWeb.configдёӯж·»еҠ дёҺжҠҘиЎЁж–Үд»¶дёҖиҮҙзҡ„ж•°жҚ®еә“иҝһжҺҘеӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҲж•°жҚ®жәҗз•Ңйқўж·»еҠ дәҰеҸҜпјү
    <connectionStrings>
        <add name="???" connectionString="data source=???;user id=???;password=???;Initial Catalog=???;Integrated Security=false" providerName="System.Data.SqlClient" />
    </connectionStrings>

и®ҝй—®жҠҘиЎЁ

  1. еҸ‘еёғең°еқҖ+вҖң/Report/Main?reportName=вҖқ+ жҠҘиЎЁеҗҚз§°

вң§вҒәвёң(в—ҸЛҷв–ҫЛҷв—Ҹ)вёқвҒәвң§

entry.title: рҹ“Јрҹ’ЁвңЁBCT Vueжҗһиө·рҹҳҺ
entry.content:
еҝ«йҖҹдёҠжүӢ

зҺҜеўғй…ҚзҪ®

е·Ҙе…·й…ҚзҪ®

HBuilder X

  1. иӢҘеҮәзҺ°еҶҷд»Јз ҒеҚЎйЎҝжғ…еҶөпјҢеҸҜеңЁи®ҫзҪ®дёӯе…ій—ӯвҖңд»Јз ҒеҠ©жүӢвҖқ

vscode

еҸҜеҸӮиҖғVue Vben Admin 2.0йЎ№зӣ®ж–ҮжЎЈ

е®үиЈ…

  1. е®үиЈ… Node.jsпјҢBetter be v12.18.4
   # еҮәзҺ°зӣёеә”npmзүҲжң¬еҚіеҸҜ
   npm -v

   # еҮәзҺ°зӣёеә”nodeзүҲжң¬еҚіеҸҜ
   node -v

е®үиЈ…дҫқиө–

  1. е®үиЈ… yarn
   # е…ЁеұҖе®үиЈ…yarn
   npm i -g yarn

   # йӘҢиҜҒ
   yarn -v # еҮәзҺ°еҜ№еә”зүҲжң¬еҸ·еҚід»ЈиЎЁе®үиЈ…жҲҗеҠҹ
  1. дҫқиө–е®үиЈ…
    # е®үиЈ…дҫқиө–
    yarn install

EChartsйңҖе®үиЈ…v4.9.0

    yarn add echarts@4.9.0

npm Script

е®үиЈ…дҫқиө–

    yarn bootstrap

иҝҗиЎҢйЎ№зӣ®

    yarn serve

жү“еҢ…йЎ№зӣ®

    yarn build

жё…з©әзј“еӯҳеҗҺжһ„е»ә

    yarn build:no-cache

йЎ№зӣ®й…ҚзҪ®йЎ№

зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸй…ҚзҪ®

йЎ№зӣ®зҡ„зҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸй…ҚзҪ®дҪҚдәҺ йЎ№зӣ®ж №зӣ®еҪ• .env гҖҒ.env.developmentгҖҒ.env.production
еҸҜеҸӮиҖғVue Vben Admin 2.0йЎ№зӣ®ж–ҮжЎЈпјҢеҪ“еүҚйЎ№зӣ®жңӘдҪҝз”ЁжңҖж–°зүҲжң¬пјҢдёҺж–ҮжЎЈз•ҘжңүдёҚеҗҢ

й…ҚзҪ®ж–Үд»¶и·Ҝеҫ„

src/settings/projectSetting.ts

иҜҙжҳҺ

    // ! ж”№еҠЁеҗҺйңҖиҰҒжё…з©әжөҸи§ҲеҷЁзј“еӯҳ
    const setting: ProjectConfig = {
    // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәSettingButton
    showSettingButton: true,
    // жқғйҷҗжЁЎејҸ,й»ҳи®ӨеүҚз«Ҝи§’иүІжқғйҷҗжЁЎејҸ
    permissionMode: PermissionModeEnum.ROLE,
    // жқғйҷҗзј“еӯҳеӯҳж”ҫдҪҚзҪ®гҖӮй»ҳи®Өеӯҳж”ҫдәҺlocalStorage
    permissionCacheType: CacheTypeEnum.LOCAL,
    // зҪ‘з«ҷзҒ°иүІжЁЎејҸпјҢз”ЁдәҺеҸҜиғҪжӮјеҝөзҡ„ж—ҘжңҹејҖеҗҜ
    grayMode: false,
    // иүІејұжЁЎејҸ
    colorWeak: false,
    // жҳҜеҗҰеҸ–ж¶ҲиҸңеҚ•,йЎ¶йғЁ,еӨҡж ҮзӯҫйЎөжҳҫзӨә, з”ЁдәҺеҸҜиғҪеҶ…еөҢеңЁеҲ«зҡ„зі»з»ҹеҶ…
    fullContent: false,
    // дё»йўҳеҶ…е®№е®ҪеәҰ
    contentMode: ContentEnum.FULL,
    // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәlogo
    showLogo: true,
    // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәеә•йғЁдҝЎжҒҜ copyright
    showFooter: true,

    // еӨҡиҜӯиЁҖй…ҚзҪ®
    locale: {
        // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨә,иҝҷйҮҢжҳҫзӨәеҸӘзҡ„жҳҜжҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәеҲҮжҚўиҜӯиЁҖзҡ„жҢүй’®
        show: true,
        // еҪ“еүҚиҜӯиЁҖ
        lang: 'zh_CN',
        // й»ҳи®ӨиҜӯиЁҖ
        fallback: 'zh_CN',
        //е…Ғи®ёзҡ„иҜӯиЁҖ
        availableLocales: ['zh_CN', 'en'],
    },
    // еӨҙйғЁй…ҚзҪ®
    headerSetting: {
        // иғҢжҷҜиүІ
        bgColor: '#ffffff',
        // еӣәе®ҡеӨҙйғЁ
        fixed: true,
        // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәйЎ¶йғЁ
        show: true,
        // дё»йўҳ
        theme: MenuThemeEnum.LIGHT,
        // ејҖеҗҜй”ҒеұҸеҠҹиғҪ
        useLockPage: true,
        // жҳҫзӨәеҲ·ж–°жҢүй’®
        showRedo: true,
        // жҳҫзӨәе…ЁеұҸжҢүй’®
        showFullScreen: true,
        // жҳҫзӨәж–ҮжЎЈжҢүй’®
        showDoc: true,
        // жҳҫзӨәж¶ҲжҒҜдёӯеҝғжҢүй’®
        showNotice: true,
        // жҳҫзӨәиҸңеҚ•жҗңзҙўжҢүй’®
        showSearch: true,
    },
    // иҸңеҚ•й…ҚзҪ®
    menuSetting: {
        // иғҢжҷҜиүІ
        bgColor: '#273352',
        // жҳҜеҗҰеӣәе®ҡдҪҸиҸңеҚ•
        fixed: true,
        // иҸңеҚ•жҠҳеҸ 
        collapsed: false,
        // жҠҳеҸ иҸңеҚ•ж—¶еҖҷжҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәиҸңеҚ•еҗҚ
        collapsedShowTitle: false,
        // жҳҜеҗҰеҸҜжӢ–жӢҪ
        canDrag: true,
        // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨә
        show: true,
        // иҸңеҚ•е®ҪеәҰ
        menuWidth: 180,
        // иҸңеҚ•жЁЎејҸ
        mode: MenuModeEnum.INLINE,
        // иҸңеҚ•зұ»еһӢ
        type: MenuTypeEnum.SIDEBAR,
        // иҸңеҚ•дё»йўҳ
        theme: MenuThemeEnum.DARK,
        // еҲҶеүІиҸңеҚ•
        split: false,
        // йЎ¶йғЁиҸңеҚ•еёғеұҖ
        topMenuAlign: 'start',
        // жҠҳеҸ и§ҰеҸ‘еҷЁзҡ„дҪҚзҪ®
        trigger: TriggerEnum.HEADER,
        // жүӢйЈҺзҗҙжЁЎејҸпјҢеҸӘеұ•зӨәдёҖдёӘиҸңеҚ•
        accordion: true,
        // еңЁи·Ҝз”ұеҲҮжҚўзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷе…ій—ӯе·Ұдҫ§ж··еҗҲиҸңеҚ•еұ•ејҖиҸңеҚ•
        closeMixSidebarOnChange: false,
        // е·Ұдҫ§ж··еҗҲиҸңеҚ•жЁЎеқ—еҲҮжҚўи§ҰеҸ‘ж–№ејҸ
        mixSideTrigger: MixSidebarTriggerEnum.CLICK,
        // жҳҜеҗҰеӣәе®ҡе·Ұдҫ§ж··еҗҲиҸңеҚ•
        mixSideFixed: false,
    },
    // еӨҡж Үзӯҫ
    multiTabsSetting: {
        // ејҖеҗҜ
        show: true,
        // ејҖеҗҜеҝ«йҖҹж“ҚдҪң
        showQuick: true,
        // жҳҜеҗҰеҸҜд»ҘжӢ–жӢҪ
        canDrag: true,

        // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәеҲ·ж–°йӮЈеҰһ
        showRedo: true,
        // жҳҜеҗҰжҳҫзӨәжҠҳеҸ жҢүй’®
        showFold: true,
    },

    // еҠЁз”»й…ҚзҪ®
    transitionSetting: {
        //  жҳҜеҗҰејҖеҗҜеҲҮжҚўеҠЁз”»
        enable: true,

        // еҠЁз”»еҗҚ
        basicTransition: RouterTransitionEnum.FADE_SIDE,

        // жҳҜеҗҰжү“ејҖйЎөйқўеҲҮжҚўloading
        openPageLoading: true,

        //жҳҜеҗҰжү“ејҖйЎөйқўеҲҮжҚўйЎ¶йғЁиҝӣеәҰжқЎ
        openNProgress: false,
    },

    // жҳҜеҗҰејҖеҗҜKeepAliveзј“еӯҳ  ејҖеҸ‘ж—¶еҖҷжңҖеҘҪе…ій—ӯ,дёҚз„¶жҜҸж¬ЎйғҪйңҖиҰҒжё…йҷӨзј“еӯҳ
    openKeepAlive: true,

    // иҮӘеҠЁй”ҒеұҸж—¶й—ҙпјҢдёә0дёҚй”ҒеұҸгҖӮ еҚ•дҪҚеҲҶй’ҹ й»ҳи®Ө1дёӘе°Ҹж—¶
    lockTime: 0,
    // жҳҫзӨәйқўеҢ…еұ‘
    showBreadCrumb: true,
    // жҳҫзӨәйқўеҢ…еұ‘еӣҫж Ү
    showBreadCrumbIcon: false,
    //  ејҖеҗҜйЎөйқўеҲҮжҚўеҠЁз”»
    openRouterTransition: true,

    // и·Ҝз”ұеҲҮжҚўеҠЁз”»
    routerTransition: RouterTransitionEnum.ZOOM_FADE,

    // жҳҜеҗҰејҖеҗҜеӣһеҲ°йЎ¶йғЁ
    useOpenBackTop: true,

    //  жҳҜеҗҰеҸҜд»ҘеөҢе…ҘiframeйЎөйқў
    canEmbedIFramePage: true,

    // еҲҮжҚўз•Ңйқўзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷжҳҜеҗҰеҲ йҷӨжңӘе…ій—ӯзҡ„messageеҸҠnotify
    closeMessageOnSwitch: true,

    // еҲҮжҚўз•Ңйқўзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷжҳҜеҗҰеҸ–ж¶Ҳе·Із»ҸеҸ‘йҖҒдҪҶжҳҜжңӘе“Қеә”зҡ„httpиҜ·жұӮгҖӮ
    // еҰӮжһңејҖеҗҜ,жғіеҜ№еҚ•зӢ¬жҺҘеҸЈиҰҶзӣ–гҖӮеҸҜд»ҘеңЁеҚ•зӢ¬жҺҘеҸЈи®ҫзҪ®
    removeAllHttpPending: true,
    };

и·Ҝз”ұ

еҸҜеҸӮиҖғVue Vben Admin 2.0йЎ№зӣ®ж–ҮжЎЈ

иҸңеҚ•

еҸҜеҸӮиҖғVue Vben Admin 2.0йЎ№зӣ®ж–ҮжЎЈ

е®ўеҲ¶еҢ–жқғйҷҗ

жқғйҷҗйӘҢиҜҒиҮӘе®ҡд№үжҢҮд»Ө

src/setup/directives/myPermission.ts

и·Ҝз”ұжқғйҷҗ

  1. еңЁRouterзҡ„metaдёӯеўһеҠ functionality
    [
        ...
        meta: {
            icon: 'gg:desktop',
            title: t('routes.systemSetting.systemSetting'),
            functionality: 'EBS.SystemSetting.Show'
        }
    ]

йЎөйқўз»„д»¶жқғйҷҗ

  1. з»„д»¶еўһеҠ v-myPermissionеұһжҖ§
    <a-button v-myPermission="'EBS.EmployeeManagement.Employee.Modify'" ></a-button>

еӣҪйҷ…еҢ–

src/locales/lang/

    // еј•е…ҘuseI18n
    import { useI18n } from '/@/hooks/web/useI18n';
    // е®һдҫӢеҢ–useI18n
    const { t } = useI18n();
    // дёҚеёҰеҸӮж•°
    const nameLabel = t('entity.employee.Name');
    // еёҰеҸӮж•°
    const searchPlaceholder = t('component.input.SearchPlaceholder', {
        name: nameLabel
    });

еӣҫж Ү

Material Design Icons
css.gg

еҸӮиҖғж–ҮжЎЈ

Vue Vben Admin 2.0йЎ№зӣ®ж–ҮжЎЈ
Ant Design of Vue 2.0.0з»„д»¶ж–ҮжЎЈ
Vue3дёӯж–Үж–ҮжЎЈ

вң§вҒәвёң(в—ҸЛҷв–ҫЛҷв—Ҹ)вёқвҒәвң§
